name: Comeketo Slack — channel map and communication register

sources.diff: Initial channel map built from first-pass surveys of the four channels Jake named (C062579HJH5, C07H2P27U7N, C0279GNRPMZ, C0APZK6RFNC). Channel purpose, cadence, and voice-register tier documented so Rodbot knows which register to reach for when drafting into each channel.

channels.name: #a_catering_group
channels.purpose: The primary sales-floor channel. Where deals-won announcements land (Close.com bot posts 'A deal has been won!' with owner/$/details), where pipeline mid-day reports drop, where Rhonna issues team-wide directives with @-tag rosters, and where Rodrigo offers emoji reactions (:fire: :confetti_ball: :muscle::skin-tone-5:) as the celebratory signature on wins. Highest-volume channel for inter-team coordination.
channels.cadence: Many messages per day. Heavy bot traffic (Close.com) plus human reactions and coordination.
channels.rodbot_register_for_drafting: operational-warm with celebratory emoji on wins. Rodrigo's signature is ellipsis-heavy acknowledgement + skin-tone-5 muscle/clap/fire emoji. Rhonna's signature is structured @-tag rosters followed by directives and 'pls confirm understanding'.
channels.notes_for_rodbot: This is the team's sales-floor; never drop prospect-facing language here. If asked to post here, match the observed register: short acknowledgements and emoji reactions from Rodrigo; structured team announcements with @-tag rosters from Rhonna; celebratory praise for wins. Portuguese/Spanish menu items appear in their bilingual forms.

channels.name: #special-requests
channels.purpose: The menu-exception clearinghouse. Sales ECs (Andre, Toni, Eduarda, Rena) bring client menu customization questions here; Rodrigo and Bibi answer as product authorities. This is where 'Can we do X?' gets confirmed or pivoted. Also where Rodrigo surfaces knowledge-base hunger ('we are building a brain for the business') — he has asked for special-requests content to be extracted to a persistent FAQ on multiple occasions.
channels.cadence: Several per week. Slower than sales-floor but voice-rich because requests are substantive.
channels.rodbot_register_for_drafting: Longer, more explicit than #a_catering_group. ECs write client summaries with section-headed asks (Food / Bar / Charcuterie / etc). Rodrigo answers in a mixed register — sometimes terse with emoji confirmations (':white_check_mark:') + brief note, sometimes full structured reply with prices/availability. Bibi's voice is warm-direct, frequently routes to Rodrigo when product-decision is above her layer.
channels.notes_for_rodbot: The canonical place to extract FAQ material. Rodrigo has explicitly flagged this channel as 'special requests = FAQ feedstock'. Rodbot should treat confirmed special-request answers here as candidate knowledge-base entries.

channels.name: #general
channels.purpose: Workspace default channel. Currently carries two distinct eras: (1) Historical 2023 VKH-era messages from Domenic, Kody Frye, Camila, Andre, and Toni running the Virtual Kitchen Hall operation — meeting minutes, KPI rollouts, onboarding sprints. (2) April 2026 onward: Jake's pipeline-audit posts (from Claude automation) and sporadic Rodrigo welcome/greeting messages.
channels.cadence: Low recent traffic. Historical Domenic-era cadence was several per day. Now mostly Jake's automation posts.
channels.rodbot_register_for_drafting: Only use this channel if explicitly asked to post there. Recent register is Jake's structured pipeline-audit format (bold headers, bullet lists, markdown). Historical register is Domenic's directive imperatives ('Cmon guys lets go', '9:30', 'be professional') and meeting-minutes summaries.
channels.notes_for_rodbot: Best source for understanding VKH (Virtual Kitchen Hall) history — Domenic's tone as operations-director and Kody Frye's inventor/builder tone (Zapier forms, partner-facing portals). Do NOT post casually here. If asked to post, match the current Jake-era structured format.

channels.name: #ai-topics
channels.purpose: Created 2026-03-26 by Rodrigo as a dedicated channel for sharing AI tools, Instagram reels, and ongoing automation-project communication. Rodrigo drops IG reels of AI dashboards / Mac Mini clusters / AI agent tools; Jake responds with context from the build side; Andre weighs in on his own command-center work. The all-caps channel kickoff post by Rodrigo: 'SO BASICALLY IS A PLACE WHERE WE WILL SHARE QUICK COMMUNICACTIONS AND REQUETS ASKS ... FOR OUR AI PROJECTS WITHIN THE COMAPNY'.
channels.cadence: A few times per week. Burst pattern — Rodrigo drops a reel, discussion follows.
channels.rodbot_register_for_drafting: Different from any other channel. Rodrigo's curiosity voice here is wide-eyed and interrogative: 'Command center whaaaaaaat @jake :nerd_face:' / 'Dang Jake I thought I had already added you here'. Andre leans into collaborator-mode here more than anywhere else: 'I would love to be part of this knowledge train'. Jake's register here is the build-side explainer with bolded concepts and :handshake: closers.
channels.notes_for_rodbot: This is the exploratory-curiosity register. When Rodrigo asks about AI tools, Rodbot can meet him with the wide-eyed tone he brings — not buttoned-up technical, but enthusiasm-matched. Good reel-drop channel.

register_selection_rule_of_thumb: Register is a function of (who is in the room) × (what Rodrigo is doing here). #a_catering_group = sales-floor, operational-warm; #special-requests = product clearinghouse, collaborative-explicit; #general = be cautious, match current-era; #ai-topics = exploratory-curiosity. Never mix registers across channels.
gaps_and_next_pulls: Only first-pass surveyed (100-200 messages per channel). Deeper sampling can expand the voice-specimen archive per person.

Did not yet survey the separate channel #the_station_a_catering_group (C070K690X0W, created by Domenic Dawson 2024-04-25) — Jake did not name it but it may be a sibling catering channel worth a survey pass.
Did not yet scan private channels, DMs, or per-captain tasting-event channels (e.g., 'Tasting Event Channel' referenced in #a_catering_group for booking confirmations).
